calendar.matters: COMPLIANCE HEARING (ADDED PER ORDER FILED ON 4/30/24

COMPLIANCE HEARING (ADDED PER ORDER FILED ON 4/30/24
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Continued To Jul-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

COMPLIANCE HEARING (ADDED PER ORDER FILED ON 4/30/24
This matter is on calendar for a compliance hearing following entry of the Judgment Approving PAGA Settlement, signed April 30, 2024. Good cause appearing, the compliance hearing is CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2026, at 9:00 am in this Department. The parties to submit a declaration from ILYM Group and a memorandum regarding any outstanding issues no later than July 16, 2026, with courtesy copy of all filings promptly delivered to this Department.

Plaintiff must lodge a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on October 27, 2025. Plaintiff shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

COMPLIANCE HEARING (ADDED PER ORDER FILED ON 4/30/24).

The compliance hearing (PAGA settlement) is CONTINUED TO APRIL 15, 2025, AT 9:0O AM IN THIS DEPARTMENT. Parties are to file a joint compliance statement and any related declarations addressing disposition of settlement proceeds and any other outstanding issues that may be discussed at the hearing no later than April 7, 2025, with courtesy copy provided to the department within 24 hours of filing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Paga Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. KYLE NORDREHAUG, Esq. of BLUMENTHAL NORDREHAUG BHOWMIK DE BLOUW LLP (tel: 858-551-1223) for Plaintiff.
Atty. Jennifer Gutenberg, Esq of FENWICK & WEST LLP (tel: 650-988-8500) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DANIEL DE LA TORRE's Motion To Approve Paga Settlement.

Matter discussed. The Court grants the motion. The Court further schedules a final approval hearing to March 25, 2025 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
